title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.100 - Board to prescribe own government
text:
172.100.  Board to prescribe own government. — The curators shall have power to make such bylaws or ordinances, rules and regulations as they may judge most expedient for the accomplishment of the trust reposed in them, and for the government of their officers and employees, and to secure their accountability, and to delegate so much of their authority as they may deem necessary to such officers and employees or to committees appointed by the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 10807) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9650; 1919 § 11547; 1909 § 11121
